(.*)(hello|hi|hey)(.*)
Hello there! How can I assist you today?
Hi! I'm here to help you.
(.*)your name(.*)
I am a friendly NLP chatbot designed for Project 7.
You can call me the NLTK Helper Bot.
(.*)created you(.*)
I was developed by my awesome group for our CS midterm project!
what can you do(.*)
I can chat with you using pattern matching! You can also type '!compare <sentence>' to see a cool NLP technique comparison.
how are you(.*)
I'm just a bunch of Python code, but I'm doing great! How about you?
Sure, I'd love to help. You can talk to me, or ask for a comparison of NLTK techniques using '!compare <sentence>'.
(.*)weather(.*)
I don't have access to live weather data yet, but I bet it's a lovely day to code!
Why do Java programmers have to wear glasses? Because they don't C#!
I know a great joke about UDP, but you might not get it.
quit
Goodbye! Have a great day!

Interesting... please tell me more.
